name: Sock It to Me Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines butter recipe Golden Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Blend cake mix, sour cream, oil, sugar, and water in a large bowl with eggs until smooth.
3. Pour about two-thirds of the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
4. Sprinkle filling ingredients over the batter in the pan.
5. Spread remaining batter evenly over the filling mixture.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 to 55 minutes, or until cake springs back when touched lightly.
7. Cool right side up for about 25 minutes before removing from the pan.
